title: festuca ovina var. heteropachys
intro: Festuca ovina var. heteropachys, also known as red fescue, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Festuca ovina var. heteropachys include reducing inflammation, soothing burns and skin conditions, and supporting the immune system. Festuca ovina var. heteropachys can be prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, and is also used in topical applications such as creams and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
